title: dasygrammitis mollicoma
intro: Dasygrammitis mollicoma, also known as the woolly grass fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, cough, and sore throat due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dasygrammitis mollicoma include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
